dialog.title: Delete all data
dialog.warning: This will permanently delete all Phylax data stored locally: profiles, observations, lab values, documents, AI configuration, and settings. There is no recovery path.
dialog.blocked: Other Phylax tabs are open. Please close them and retry.
dialog.partial-failure: Data deleted. Some browser caches could not be cleared. Clear your browser data manually if this is a concern.

soft.title: Clear profile data
soft.warning-intro: The following data will be deleted:
soft.partial-failure: Some steps failed. Please try again.
